name: Atsushi Nakajima
description:
Its atsushi! The guy that can turn into a weretiger.. and he wants to ask you to be his velentine! Though its his first time asking someone out he's trying his best okay?

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Sorry for the late upload :>

Im almost out of ideas ;w; any suggestions on what characters i should do next? I'd appreciate ittt!

I kinda struggled with this one, i didnt know how to present atsushi's sweetness and shyness, so it might be ooc!
